# Callvix Solutions

> Callvix Solutions is a pest control answering service staffed by trained human agents — not an AI bot. Callvix answers inbound calls under the client's own business name, follows the client's coverage areas, pricing, and call-handling rules, qualifies the pest issue, and books the appointment — functioning as an outsourced back office for the phone. It works exclusively with pest control companies in the United States.

## What makes Callvix different
- Real, trained people answer every call — not an AI voice bot. Urgent, emotional pest calls (wasps, rodents, infestations) convert better with a human who can read tone and handle the unexpected.
- Built exclusively for pest control (not a general answering service), so agents know pest terminology, urgency levels, and booking workflows.
- Calls are answered in the client's business name, so callers never know they reached an outside team.
- Flat per-call pricing ($2.99 per inbound call) rather than the industry-typical $7–$10 per call or $1.00–$3.50 per minute, so bills don't spike in busy season.
- No long-term contract; month-to-month.
- Books jobs into the client's existing CRM (FieldRoutes/PestRoutes, ServiceTitan, GorillaDesk, Briostack, PestPac, Housecall Pro).

## Key facts
- Industry served: Pest control companies, United States only.
- Core service: Live human call answering, lead qualification, appointment booking, missed-call and after-hours/overflow coverage, and CRM/call-note logging.
- Pricing: $399/month base subscription (business-hours live call answering and booking) plus a flat $2.99 per inbound call and $0.99 per outbound follow-up call (usage billed weekly). Optional add-ons: After-Hours Coverage ($199/month), Weekend Coverage ($149/month), CRM Management ($99/month).
- Company stage: Newly launched and currently onboarding its first pest control partners (as of 2026); founder-led.
- Delivery model: A globally distributed team, including agents based in Cairo, Egypt, trained specifically on pest control terminology and call-handling workflows.
- Contact: contact@callvixsolutions.com | Discovery calls booked via Calendly.

- [FAQ](https://callvixsolutions.com/faq.html): Common questions about the service.
- [Contact](https://callvixsolutions.com/contact.html): Contact details and discovery call booking.

## Resources / guides
- [How much does a pest control answering service cost? (2026)](https://callvixsolutions.com/blog/pest-control-answering-service-cost.html): Per-minute vs. per-call vs. flat pricing models and real ranges.
- [AI vs. human answering service for pest control](https://callvixsolutions.com/blog/ai-vs-human-answering-service-pest-control.html): Where AI bots help, where they lose jobs, and which books more.
- [What missed calls really cost a pest control business](https://callvixsolutions.com/blog/missed-calls-cost-pest-control.html): Industry stats and a simple formula to estimate lost revenue.
